mapper.sql: SELECT A.ORG_ID , A.DEPT_ID , A.UP_DEPT_ID , A.DEPTNM , A.DEPT_ENNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT A WHERE 1=1
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : UsrDeptCdDAO.listDeptByStdHaksaTerm 설 명 : 학과(부서) 목록 조회 (학기별 수강생의 부서) */ SELECT A.DEPT_ID , A.DEPTNM FROM ( SELECT A.DEPT_ID , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_ID WHERE ORG_ID = 'ORG0000001' AND DEPT_ID = A.DEPT_ID) AS DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_USR A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' JOIN ( SELECT A.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT A JOIN ( -- 학기제 개설과목 SELECT A.SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT A JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.CRS_SMSTR_ID = ( SELECT CRS_SMSTR_ID FROM CRS_SMSTR WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND DGRS_YR = #{haksaYear} AND DGRS_SMSTR = #{haksaTerm} ) WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SBJCT_TYCD = 'UNI' ) B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' GROUP BY A.USER_ID ) C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID GROUP BY A.DEPT_ID ) A ORDER BY A.DEPTNM
